title: cuscuta urceolata
intro: Cuscuta urceolata, also known as Dodder or Convolvulus, is a parasitic plant that grows on other plants, obtaining its nutrients by connecting to the host plant's vascular system. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Cuscuta urceolata include its potential to improve fertility, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of insomnia and hypertension. In herbal preparations, Cuscuta urceolata is often used in the form of capsules, teas, or infusions, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal herb require further scientific research.
